title: Login via Kong returns JWT from GoTrue
description: POST /auth/v1/token?grant_type=password through Kong with valid credentials. GoTrue should authenticate the user and return access_token + refresh_token. This validates the login flow works end-to-end through the gateway.
author: dlesieur
notes: Requires AUTH-005 to have been run first (to create the test user). This is the precondition for the full cross-service test: login → get JWT → access /rest with JWT.
